public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as public herald.
appearance: Cold-ready layered gear, ward-conscious fastening, and containment-minded kit signal disciplined caution.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of public herald in and around Route Warden Compacts, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Route Warden Compacts workable through the obligations of public herald while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around Route Warden Compacts, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of public herald visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Aster Snowveil needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Route Warden Compacts.
Aster Snowveil can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Route Warden Compacts.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Aster Snowveil as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Public Herald, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
what_they_refuse: Aster Snowveil refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Public Herald too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Aster Snowveil can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Aster Snowveil adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
